title: GE Healthcare India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: GE Healthcare India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? GE Healthcare India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About GE Healthcare India:
GE Healthcare India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GE Healthcare India!
